extension_description.message: Prevents X (Twitter) from automatically redirecting to /home after account switch.

consent_intro.message: To use this extension, you must agree to the following terms and risk analysis. This extension aims to protect your browsing flow by preventing unwanted redirects.

consent_policy_data.message: Data Usage: This extension saves its state (last visited URL) locally in your browser. No data is sent to external servers.

consent_risk_content.message: This extension does NOT manipulate the DOM or page content, which significantly reduces detection risk. However, automate-like navigation patterns might be monitored by X. Use at your own risk.

consent_checkbox.message: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.
